name: product-manager-prompts
description: PM validation and prompting toolkit based on Dean Peters' product-manager-prompts. Provides structured frameworks for Jobs-to-be-Done, user stories, positioning statements, customer journey mapping, PESTEL analysis, TAM/SAM/SOM, and Working Backwards documents. Use to validate and improve PM artifacts.

author.name: Jon Kramer
author.attribution: Based on product-manager-prompts by Dean Peters (https://github.com/deanpeters/product-manager-prompts)
